generated_oml:
// ==================== Physical Components ====================

instance AxisVertical : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First (vertical) axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, includes motor, gearbox, encoders, safety limits, max speed 75°/s."
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the vertical axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transmitting motor torque to the axis."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission coupling motor and cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft."
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the gearbox output shaft."
]

instance SafetyCellLimits : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Safety limits of –90° to +90° for the vertical axis."
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DCNCController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller that commands the robot axis."
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains AxisVertical, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGearbox,
                GearTransmission, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder,
                SafetyCellLimits, SiemensSINUMERIK840DCNCController
]

// ==================== Sensing Components ====================

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor input current I_M, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor reporting motor shaft position, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor reporting gearbox output position, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Software component deriving motor torque from current and motor parameters, streamed as torque data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Software component deriving angular velocity from encoder positions, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Software component deriving angular acceleration from velocity, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// ==================== Data Transmitted ====================

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedVelocitySensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAccelerationSensor
]

// ==================== Data ====================

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor encoder positions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox encoder positions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque trace computed from motor current."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity trace."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration trace."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEngine
]

// ==================== Enablers ====================

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for streaming sensor time‑series to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool hosting block definition and internal block diagrams of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelManagementService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing friction and frictionless simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing engine that consumes sensor traces, runs Simulink models and identifies friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService,
                        SimulationComparisonService,
                        FrictionModelUpdateService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard providing real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell component that packages models for standardized exchange."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelPackagingService
]

instance MethodologyEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine implementing the purpose‑driven twinning workflow (problem ID, model analysis, simulation, data ID)."
    DTDFVocab:enables MethodologyService
]

// ==================== Services ====================

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides live visualization of measured vs simulated torque, velocity and acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters of the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight,
                        KineticFrictionParameterInsight,
                        ViscousFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated outputs of various friction models with measured sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationAgreementInsight
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates updated friction model files that can be fed back to the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ingests streamed MQTT data into the digital shadow's data store."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance EngineeringModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages SysML engineering models of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes Simulink friction models for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationExecutionInsight
]

instance ModelPackagingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Packages models into Asset Administration Shell submodels for downstream consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPackagingInsight
]

instance MethodologyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Orchestrates the twinning process according to the purpose‑driven methodology."
    DTDFVocab:provides PurposeDrivenMethodologyInsight
]

// ==================== Insights ====================

instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified static friction coefficient of the gearbox."
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified kinetic friction coefficient of the gearbox."
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified viscous friction coefficient of the gearbox."
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion accuracy of the vertical axis due to updated friction model."
]

instance SimulationAgreementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Degree of agreement between simulated and measured data for each friction model."
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful ingestion of live sensor streams into the digital shadow."
]

instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Availability of up‑to‑date SysML engineering models."
]

instance SimulationExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Execution results of Simulink friction simulations."
]

instance ModelPackagingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Models are available as AAS submodels for downstream consumption."
]

instance PurposeDrivenMethodologyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Purpose‑driven methodology (problem identification, model analysis, simulation, data identification) guides twin evolution."
]

// ==================== Actions ====================

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates the friction model used by the SINUMERIK 840D controller with newly identified parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// ==================== Models ====================

instance EngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance FrictionlessBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing frictionless behavior of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual‑to‑physical interaction; the digital shadow is defined as a passive, one‑directional data flow from the physical robot to the virtual model."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twin operates in real‑time, processing incoming sensor streams at the acquisition rate and performing friction‑parameter identification continuously during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow constellation consists of a Purpose element (FrictionDerivation), an Asset element (the first robot axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that execute the Simulink models, and DataTraces that capture both measured and simulated torque/velocity data. The components are linked according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model, ensuring traceability from raw data to model outputs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the operational stage of the robot. Engineering models (SysML) are created in the design phase, and live operational data are used at run‑time to continuously update the friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability is maintained by linking each DataTrace to its generating Processing component and underlying models. Model fidelity is ensured by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces with measured references, allowing multi‑physics‑aware identification of friction parameters. The approach supports validation of white‑box and black‑box friction models over the robot’s operating time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol over a network connection."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses Asset Administration Shells (AAS) to encapsulate the robot's asset information, as referenced in the abstract. No further standards are explicitly mentioned."
]
